creator: fedor9@gmail.com
text:
Exim has been updated to version 4.73. This version fixes serious bug CVE-2010-4345, that leads to privilege escalation. 

The official change log - ftp://ftp.exim.org/pub/exim/ChangeLogs/ChangeLog-4.73

Fix: 

Exim release 4.73 is now available from the primary ftp site:
  * ftp://ftp.exim.org/pub/exim/exim4/exim-4.73.tar.gz
  * ftp://ftp.exim.org/pub/exim/exim4/exim-4.73.tar.bz2
